Love is a term which is important in human culture.

Lifeism divides love into three categories [[Agape]], [[Phileros|Xenia]], and [[Storge]] plus the harmful pseudo love of [[romance]]<ref>http://evolution.faith/love/</ref>

==References==

<references />

[[Category:Love]]
[[sn:Love]][[Category:John Vervaeke]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[sn:Love]]
[[Category:Pages]]
